_comment: User-facing text for mc-course-intake/mc-course-intake.gs. Edit here; changes are live within ~5 minutes (script cache TTL). Use {{placeholder}} syntax for dynamic values.
approved_body:
Dear {{instructor_name}},

Your MorphoCloud per-course allocation request has been approved!
While the admins are setting up your course, please follow these
instructions. A full post-approval guide is available here:
  https://github.com/MorphoCloud/docs/blob/main/instructor/post-repo.md

Course:      {{course_name}}
GitHub Repo: {{repo_url}}

**STEP 1 — Accept two GitHub invitations**

  You have two pending invitations that must be accepted before you
  can access your course repository. Both are listed in the same place:

     https://github.com/settings/organizations

  Log in to GitHub → visit the link above → you will see two pending
  invitations: one for the MorphoCloud organization and one for the
  {{repo_name}} repository. Accept BOTH.

  Your team membership and repository access will not activate until
  both invitations are accepted.

**STEP 2 — Create your student roster spreadsheet**

  You will need a Google account for this step. The roster is a Google
  Sheet that MorphoCloud reads to look up student email addresses when
  sending instance credentials.

  a) Open this link to create your own copy of the roster template:
     http://roster.morphocloud.org

     **IMPORTANT:** This link creates a NEW spreadsheet in your Google
     Drive. After clicking it, you will have your own copy with a
     DIFFERENT URL. Do NOT save or reuse the link above — it is only
     for creating the copy.

  b) Add your own GitHub username and email to column A (github_handle)
     and column B (email). This is enough to get started and test the
     system. You can add your students later as they officially enroll
     in the course — the roster is dynamic, so you can update it at
     any time.

  c) Share your spreadsheet with morphocloudportal@gmail.com
     (Viewer access is sufficient).

  We will contact you when your course repository is ready and provide
  instructions for entering your roster spreadsheet URL at that time.

**A NOTE ABOUT EMAILS**

  You may receive automated emails from two sources. Emails from
  GitHub (e.g., notifications@github.com) are system notifications
  about repository activity — you can ignore these. The emails that
  matter come from no-reply@morphocloud.org — these contain instance
  credentials, enrollment confirmations, and action items. This
  applies to your students as well — they will receive their instance
  credentials from no-reply@morphocloud.org, so please remind them
  to check their spam folder if they don't see it.

**DOCUMENTATION**

  Post-approval setup guide:
  https://github.com/MorphoCloud/docs/blob/main/instructor/post-repo.md

  Instructor overview (course day-1 actions):
  https://github.com/MorphoCloud/docs/blob/main/instructor/Overview.md#course-day-1-actions

Questions? Contact {{contact_email}}

-- The MorphoCloud Team
rejected_body:
Dear {{instructor_name}},

After review, we are unable to approve your MorphoCloud per-course allocation request for "{{course_name}}" at this time.

If you have questions or would like to discuss alternatives, please contact {{contact_email}}.

-- The MorphoCloud Team
